song.title: As I Lift You Up
song.author: Jeff Deyo
song.presentation: V1 P C V2 P C B C
song.lyrics: [V1] .F Am Dm I’m reaching up, I’m reaching out . Bb F To be with You, Lord, I wanna be with You now. . Am Dm There’s nothing quite like Your voice in my ear. . Bb Gm It’s gentle and soft, You know it’s honest and real. [P] . C Gm C I open my hands and I open my heart. [C] . F C As I lift You up from the earth . Gm Won’t You draw me in . Dm C Won’t You pull me close . F C As I lift Your name to the heavens . Gm Won’t You call me home . Dm C F Won’t You call everyone to Your throne [V2] If it is true, then how can it be The thing You want most from me is intimacy. I try in my power to give you enough But first what You ask is that I give You my love. So [B] .G F C G Come make me all that You want me to be . F C G My praises working that all would believe . Eb Change us for all of eternity
